profile: Walhimer Studio unified catalog. Canonical rows are works[]. Sketch series order comes from sketches/index.html (fallback; catalog-work SERIES empty) on refresh; installation HTML is merged from works[] and installations/*.html. Soundscape list is derived from works, not stored separately.
